name_en: Dior❤️ Toujours Handbag [Waxed Leather Black Medium]
name_cn:
Dior❤️ Toujours Handbag [Waxed Leather Black Medium]
This Dior Toujours handbag debuted at the Spring/Summer 2023 show, featuring a unique casual and practical design. Crafted from black calfskin, it is detailed with oversized houndstooth stitching. The spacious interior features a compartment and a small pocket for neatly organizing daily essentials. It features a CD Lock letter D turn-lock closure with adjustable sides to elevate the style. The leather handle has adjustable details for easy hand carrying.
CD Lock and drawstring closure
D.I.O.R. charm
Removable inner pocket
Adjustable leather handle
Includes dust bag
Model: 2821
Dimensions: 28.5x19x21.5cm. 000740
